title: Jicklysium
body:
Jicklysium is the next step in evolution within the Jicklus Cinematic Universe, featuring lots of texture variation, custom mob models, and a hell of a lot more! This pack is my pride and joy, and I hate the Jicklus resource pack so download this one instead.
 
USE OPTIFINE

If you're downloading a new update, delete the old file, don't replace it!

DISCLAIMER:
This pack is for personal use only. You are not allowed to redistribute it publicly.
If you use this pack in videos you've uploaded to the internet, please credit it in the description.
Thank you!
